sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46665" key="h(du/deipnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδύ-δειπνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dainty-supping</tr_>, name of a parasite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.68</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
